svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Codex"> <diagram id="agent-task-loop-core-flow" name="Agent Task Loop 核心执行闭环"> <mxGraphModel dx="-824" dy="-190" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1600" pageHeight="900" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=28;fontStyle=1;" value="Agent Task Loop V0.1 核心执行闭环" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="800" x="400" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="step-1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#eef4ff;strokeColor=#5b8def;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=17;fontStyle=1;" value="收集进入 Inbox
保留来源" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="160" x="30" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="decision-1" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff7db;strokeColor=#d8a437;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=17;fontStyle=1;" value="信息完整且
人工确认？" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="160" x="230" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="step-2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff7db;strokeColor=#d8a437;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=17;fontStyle=1;" value="进入 Ready
允许自动执行" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="160" x="430" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="step-3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#eef4ff;strokeColor=#5b8def;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=17;fontStyle=1;" value="队列校验与领取
并发 1 / 每日 3 个" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="160" x="630" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="step-4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#eef4ff;strokeColor=#5b8def;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=17;fontStyle=1;" value="Agent 只读调研
读取授权上下文" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="160" x="830" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="step-5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dff4e6;strokeColor=#2e9c61;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=17;fontStyle=1;" value="提交 Artifact
进入 Review" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="160" x="1030" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="decision-2" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff7db;strokeColor=#d8a437;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=17;fontStyle=1;" value="人工验收
通过？" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="160" x="1230" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="step-6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dff4e6;strokeColor=#2e9c61;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=17;fontStyle=1;" value="Done
保留最终结果" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="140" x="1430" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="branch-1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe5e1;strokeColor=#c65d4d;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=16;" value="保持 Inbox
提示缺失信息" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="160" x="230" y="390" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="branch-2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe5e1;strokeColor=#c65d4d;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=16;" value="退回 Ready
附反馈并保留历史" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="180" x="1030" y="390" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="branch-3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe5e1;strokeColor=#c65d4d;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=16;" value="连续两次失败
进入 Blocked" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="160" x="830" y="60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="support" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff1b8;strokeColor=#d8a437;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=17;fontStyle=1;" value="全程约束：来源可追溯 / 权限最小化 / 状态可观察 / 运行可审计 / Agent 不得自行确认 Ready 或 Done" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="760" x="430" y="560" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="step-1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#4e7fd1;strokeWidth=2.5;endArrow=block;" target="decision-1" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="decision-1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#d8a437;strokeWidth=2.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=15;" target="step-2" value="是"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="step-2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#4e7fd1;strokeWidth=2.5;endArrow=block;" target="step-3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="step-3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#4e7fd1;strokeWidth=2.5;endArrow=block;" target="step-4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="step-4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#2e9c61;strokeWidth=2.5;endArrow=block;" target="step-5"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e6" edge="1" parent="1" source="step-5" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#2e9c61;strokeWidth=2.5;endArrow=block;" target="decision-2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e7" edge="1" parent="1" source="decision-2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#2e9c61;strokeWidth=2.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=15;" target="step-6" value="通过"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e8" edge="1" parent="1" source="decision-1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#c65d4d;strokeWidth=2.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=15;" target="branch-1" value="否"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e9" edge="1" parent="1" source="decision-2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#c65d4d;strokeWidth=2.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=15;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;" target="branch-2" value="退回"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="1310" y="430" /> <mxPoint x="1230" y="430" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e10" edge="1" parent="1" source="branch-2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#c65d4d;strokeWidth=2.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=15;" target="step-2" value="重新执行"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e11" edge="1" parent="1" source="step-4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#c65d4d;strokeWidth=2.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=15;" target="branch-3" value="失败"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
